ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-29-2020 Continued To Aug-26-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on August 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
